calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kay Magilavy, in court, in propria persona, Executor; John O'Grady, via Zoom, in propria persona, Objector.

Ms. Magilavy offers testimony regarding the history of this matter and of the issues she encountered working with Mr. O'Grady. Mr. O'Grady offers advocacy for his work with this matter when he represented Ms. Magilavy.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Continued To Aug-10-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Jun-29-2022 Continued To Jul-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-01-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: John E. O'Grady appearing by Zoom for Kay Magilavy. Maureen Magilavy appearing by CourtCall as a self-represented litigant.

The Court stated that before it today is an Amended Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. Maureen Magilavy stated that she was objecting to the petition. The Court stated that the objection would need to be in writing. Maureen Magilavy stated that she submitted it to the court. The Court inquired about the creditor's claim. Ms. Magilavy confirmed that she did submit a creditor's claim. The Court addressed the current posture of the case, stated that its understanding is that Maureen Magilavy is not objecting to the appointment of Kay Magilavy, and that Maureen Magilavy wants her creditor's claim acknowledged. Maureen Magilavy confirmed for the Court that she is not objecting to the appointment of Kay Magilavy and that she is seeking acknowledgment of her creditor's claim. The Court stated that the Probate Code 6112 presumption has been rebutted and stated that it would allow limited authority or full bond. Mr. O'Grady stated that they want the whole bond. Maureen Magilavy stated that Kay Magilavy is using assets for her own benefit, that she cut her father off, and that there is an upcoming hearing. Mr. O'Grady stated that Maureen Magilavy is speaking about a case in Arizona, that she is not speaking about this case, and that she is making allegations which are not relevant. The Court noted that Maureen Magilavy was not on notice. Mr. O'Grady stated that she's not served and she is a creditor. Maureen Magilavy stated that she is a creditor, that she knew nothing about this, and that Kay knows that she is a creditor. The Court inquired about Maureen Magilavy's relationship to Simone Thomas. Maureen Magilavy stated that she was Simone Thomas' father's wife. The Court stated that before it today is a petition to appoint Kay Magilavy, that this is being done so that estate of Simone Thomas is represented by someone, and that it is requiring the full amount of bond. The Court took the Amended Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary under submission. Status on close of the estate is set for November 17, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court addressed Maureen Magilavy stating that if she is going to get an attorney that she should do it as soon as possible.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
